caption: The video features a man speaking at an event hosted by the United States Institute of Peace, as indicated by the backdrop. He is dressed formally in a black suit, white shirt, and dark tie, with a name tag that reads "Timothy Phillips." The man appears to be addressing an audience, gesturing with his right hand for emphasis while holding some papers in his left hand. His expression and body language suggest he is engaged in delivering a speech or presentation, likely on a topic related to peace or international affairs, given the setting. The atmosphere seems professional and focused, typical of a formal conference or seminar.
